pi_items.source: Verified from setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads the dem.tif to this exact path.
Verified from task.json instructions explicitly demanding BEAM-DIMAP export named 'tpi_analysis', which generates this file.
Verified from task.json instructions requiring a GeoTIFF export precisely to this target path.
Verified from task instructions stating to classify into exactly 3 distinct categorical values, supported by export_result.sh counting unique pixel values.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real Digital Elevation Model (DEM) from the opengeos repository. Setup scripts confirm the target input data path is /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif. Output requirements dictate the creation of /home/ga/snap_exports/tpi_analysis.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/landform_class.tif, with the final TIFF containing exactly 3 distinct landform class values.
